/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/consumer.dir/callfriendservice.cc.o CMakeFiles/consumer.dir/__/friend.pb.cc.o -o ../../../bin/consumer   -L/home/duan/my_rpc/my_mprpc/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/duan/my_rpc/my_mprpc/lib ../../../lib/libmprpc.a -lprotobuf -lpthread -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lpthread -lzookeeper_mt
